shortDescription: Built internal tools to help the investment team evaluate and compare startup founders.
details: Developed a centralized founder evaluation dashboard using Next.js and Node.js.
Optimized database queries and API logic, reducing response times by ~30%.
Helped streamline founder screening workflows, reducing evaluation time by 60%.

shortDescription: Led a team of developers to deliver a real product for an external client.
details: Managed a team of 6 developers across the full product lifecycle.
Ran weekly sprint meetings, set technical direction, and ensured accountability.
Worked closely with developers to unblock technical challenges and meet deadlines.

shortDescription: Selected for a competitive fellowship focused on applying AI to real-world problems.
details: Selected as 1 of 32 fellows from over 350 applicants.
Led user research interviews with teachers, students, and school board CTOs.
Helped design an AI-driven education tool focused on reducing cognitive offloading.
